mapper.select: select id, bank_name, category_name, question_count, difficulty, status, update_time, created_at, updated_at, created_by, updated_by, deleted from question_banks where id = #{id} and deleted = false

select count(1) from question_banks
and deleted = false
and (bank_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or category_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
and status = #{status}
mapper.update: update question_banks set bank_name = #{bankName}, category_name = #{categoryName}, question_count = #{questionCount}, difficulty = #{difficulty}, status = #{status}, update_time = #{updateTime}, updated_at = #{updatedAt}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, deleted = #{deleted} where id = #{id} and deleted = false
